chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6309 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.29442/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr.Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Siddique, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Sadar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition has served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of with directions that the fate of security shall be subject to the order of the Collector of Customs Appeals. Order accordingly. Judge Judge NASIR
